text:
dchagin@mordor>
dchagin@mordor> pkg info | grep firefox
firefox-67.0,1                 Web browser based on the browser portion of Mozilla
dchagin@mordor> /usr/local/lib/firefox/firefox
XPCOMGlueLoad error for file /home/rootlocal/lib/firefox/libxul.so:
Shared object "libssl3.so" not found, required by "libxul.so"
Couldn't load XPCOM.
dchagin@mordor>
